jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at ICAT
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!
